ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Waiting for files to be created...

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Python venv and faster-whisper will be automatically set up when you first run a transcription.
ast.target: 首次运行转录时，将自动设置 Python venv 和 faster-whisper。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Transcription is only available on desktop (Windows, macOS, Linux) from version 1.5.0 onwards. Mobile devices can create tiktok notes but cannot generate transcriptions.
ast.target: 转录功能仅适用于 1.5.0 版本及以上的桌面端（Windows、macOS、Linux）。移动设备可以创建 TikTok 笔记，但无法生成转录。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Local transcription requires Python, yt-dlp, ffmpeg, and faster-whisper.
ast.target: 本地转录需要 Python、yt-dlp、ffmpeg 和 faster-whisper。
